assignProver(bytes32,address).details: Only callable by the operator. Validates that the prover is active in      ProverRegistry and that the request has not expired.

params._minFee: Minimum fee in wei for proof requests
params._operator: Address of the privileged operator (EOA or multisig)
params._proofRegistry: Address of the deployed ProofRegistry contract
params._proverRegistry: Address of the deployed ProverRegistry contract
params._verifyPrecompile: Address of the VerifyUltraHonk precompile        (0x0300000000000000000000000000000000000002 on Sincerin L1)

returns._0: The vkHash, or bytes32(0) if the circuit is not registered
The keccak256 hash of the public inputs committed at request time

registerCircuit(bytes32,bytes32).details: Only callable by the operator. A circuit can only be registered once;      to update a circuit's vkHash, deploy a new circuitId.

params.circuitId: Unique identifier for the circuit (e.g., keccak256("proof-of-age"))
params.vkHash: Hash of the verification key used by the precompile

requestProof(bytes32,bytes32,uint256).details: The caller must send at least minFee as msg.value. The deadline must      be in the future. The circuitId must have been previously registered      by the operator. A unique requestId is generated deterministically      from (circuitId, sender, timestamp, nonce) to prevent collisions.

params.circuitId: The identifier of the circuit to prove
params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the request expires
params.publicInputsHash: Hash of the public inputs for the proof.        Stored so submitProof can validate consistency.

returns.requestId: Unique identifier for this proof request

params.newMinFee: The new minimum fee in wei

setOperator(address).details: Only callable by the current operator

submitProof(bytes32,bytes,bytes,bytes).details: CEI pattern with reentrancy guard. The precompile staticcall is safe      before effects because staticcall cannot modify state.      Flow on success:        1. Validate request state (Checks)        2. Call precompile to verify proof (staticcall — cannot modify state)        3. Update request status, register proof, update reputation (Effects)        4. Transfer fee to prover (Interactions)      Flow on failure:        1. Validate request state (Checks)        2. Call precompile — verification fails        3. Update request status, update reputation negatively (Effects)        4. No fee transfer

params.proof: Raw UltraHonk proof bytes from Barretenberg (~2KB)
params.publicInputs: Raw public inputs (each 32 bytes = one field element)
params.vk: Full verification key bytes (must hash to registered vkHash)

DEFAULT_VERIFY_PRECOMPILE().notice: Default address of the VerifyUltraHonk precompile on Sincerin L1

assignProver(bytes32,address).notice: Assign a registered prover to a pending proof request

constructor.notice: Deploys the Coordinator with references to companion contracts

getCircuitVKHash(bytes32).notice: Get the verification key hash for a registered circuit

getRequest(bytes32).notice: Get the full details of a proof request

getRequestPublicInputsHash(bytes32).notice: Get the stored public inputs hash for a proof request

minFee().notice: Minimum fee in wei required for a proof request

nonces(address).notice: Nonce per requester address for deterministic unique requestIds

operator().notice: Privileged operator that can assign provers and register circuits

proofRegistry().notice: ProofRegistry contract for Merkle tree of verified proofs

proverRegistry().notice: ProverRegistry contract for prover lifecycle management

registerCircuit(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Register a new circuit with its verification key hash

registeredCircuits(bytes32).notice: Circuit registry: circuitId => verification key hash

requestProof(bytes32,bytes32,uint256).notice: Submit a proof request for a specific circuit

requestPublicInputsHash(bytes32).notice: Public inputs hash per request, stored separately from the struct

setMinFee(uint256).notice: Update the minimum fee for proof requests

submitProof(bytes32,bytes,bytes,bytes).notice: Submit a proof for verification against the VerifyUltraHonk precompile
